$comment: Template for audit-logs/summary-report.json, produced by loop/generate_summary.py at the end of the 7-day schedule. Values below describe each field.

totals.regressions_reverted: <integer — revisions discarded by the judge guard>
totals.aggregate_score_delta: <number — sum of all applied score deltas>

errors: <flattened list of every error object from all cycle audit logs>
next_steps: <guidance string: acknowledge reminder, start new schedule>
